caption: In a medical simulation setting, a group of healthcare students and instructors work with a medical mannequin on a hospital bed. In the early frames, several individuals in blue scrubs and one person in a black jacket and face mask are gathered around the bed, interacting with the mannequin. A person in a grey hoodie and pink pants stands nearby. The environment includes medical equipment, red storage cabinets, and a white wall. Overlaid text reads "Day 3" in a pink circle and "Sim Week" next to a logo. As the scene progresses, the setting shifts to a different room where a patient in a hospital gown sits in a chair. She is attended to by a person in a black jacket and another person in a grey blazer and blue pants. A pink banner appears at the bottom with the text "Obtain Consent" next to "Day 3" and "Sim Week."
